⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Am I compliant? →

for every agency, every language, every deadline.

Our services

Seven integrated services. One veteran-owned vendor.
One contract vehicle.

View Store & Pricing
🔤

Certified Translation

ATA-certified. USCIS accepted. 300+ language pairs. From $24.99/page.
🎙️

Interpretation

OPI, VRI, and in-person. 24/7 availability. HIPAA & FERPA compliant.
♿

ADA / Section 508

PDF remediation, WCAG audits, VPAT creation. ADA Title II deadline: April 2026.
📹

Video Captioning

ADA-compliant captions. Multilingual subtitles. $2.50/min. 48-hour turnaround.
📝

Transcription

Legal, medical, and government transcription. Subject-matter specialists. 98%+ accuracy.
🖨️

Desktop Publishing

Multilingual typesetting. RTL languages. 300+ scripts. Accessible PDF output.
🤖

AI Automation

Done-for-you AI systems. Workflow automation, outreach engines, reporting. From $297/mo.
📋

Free Compliance FAQ

100+ answers on Title VI, Section 508, ADA, WCAG, HIPAA, FERPA, and IDEA.
Who we serve

Built for the organizations with the highest
compliance stakes and most diverse populations.

🏛️

Government Agencies

Title VI, EO 13166, Section 508. GSA and NASPO contracts. All 50 states.
🏫

School Districts

IDEA, FERPA, Title III. IEP interpreters. Parent notice translation. NASPO eligible.
🏥

Healthcare

HIPAA, Section 1557, Section 504. BAA available. 24/7 medical OPI.
⚖️

Legal & Courts

Court-certified interpreters. Legal document translation. USCIS accepted.
🤝

Nonprofits

Title VI for federal grant recipients. Mission-aligned pricing. 300+ languages.
🎖️

Veteran-Owned (VOSB)

SBA certified VOSB. GSA and NASPO contractor. SAM registered. ATA member. BBB A+.

$2.50 /minute

About Language Access Hub

The only vendor that combines all four in one contract.

Language Access Hub is powered by Taika Translations and TVPTeam — both veteran-owned, both SBA VOSB certified, both GSA and NASPO contracted. We grew from $1M to $19M using the same AI automation systems we now deploy for our clients.

What sets us apart isn't any one service — it's that we deliver all four (translation, interpretation, digital accessibility, and AI automation) from a single veteran-owned vendor on a single cooperative contract. No fragmented vendor management. No compliance gaps between providers.

30,000+Projects delivered
1B+Words translated
2,000+Language professionals
5.0 ★Google rating
GSA Schedule

Active federal contract vehicle. Federal agencies order directly without a new competitive procurement.

NASPO ValuePoint

Active cooperative contract. State and local agencies in participating states order via Participating Addendum.

SBA VOSB Certified

Veteran-Owned Small Business. SBA certified. Supports VOSB set-aside and sole-source requirements.

ATA Member · BBB A+ · SAM Registered

American Translators Association member. BBB Accredited A+. SAM.gov registered and active.

Free: Language Access & Digital Compliance Checklist

100+ compliance checkpoints covering Title VI, EO 13166, Section 508, ADA Title II, WCAG 2.1/2.2, HIPAA, FERPA, and IDEA. For compliance officers, procurement directors, and IT leads.

Active government contracts

Already approved through your existing
procurement vehicle.

Federal Agencies

GSA Multiple Award Schedule

We hold an active GSA Schedule contract for language services. Federal agencies issue task orders directly — no competitive bid required for orders under simplified acquisition thresholds. SmartPay cards accepted.

No new procurementP-card acceptedAll NAICS codes
State & Local Agencies

NASPO ValuePoint Cooperative Contract

We hold active NASPO ValuePoint cooperative contracts with Participating Addendum agreements across multiple states. State agencies, school districts, and local governments issue task orders directly against the PA — no new bid.

Active PAs in multiple statesLocal gov eligible
Texas Minnesota Rhode Island Check your state →
